About.departmentDesc: Imbali, injongo, nombono we-SU Computer Science.
About.alumniDesc: Abaphumeleleyo abaye bayila isebe lethu kunye nomhlaba.

DepartmentPage.title: ISebe Lethu
DepartmentPage.subtitle: Ngaphezulu kweminyaka engama-50 yobugcisa kwimfundo ye-Computer Science kunye nophando kwiYunivesithi yaseStellenbosch.
DepartmentPage.historyText1: ISebe le-Computer Science kwiYunivesithi yaseStellenbosch linembali etyebileyo eqhubeka iminyaka engaphezulu kwamashumi amahlanu.
DepartmentPage.historyText2: Ngokuhamba kweminyaka, isebe liye lakhula kunye notshintsho olukhawulezayo lwetekhnoloji.
DepartmentPage.missionText: Ukuba liziko eliphambili lemfundo ye-Computer Science kunye nophando e-Afrika.
DepartmentPage.researchText: Amalungu ethu afakalthi asebenza kwiindawo ezahlukeneyo zophando eziquka i-AI, ukufunda koomatshini, ubunjineli besoftware, kunye nokunye.
DepartmentPage.locationText: Isebe likumgangatho wesihlanu wesakhiwo se-General Engineering kwikhampasi enkulu yeYunivesithi yaseStellenbosch.

StaffPage.title: Abasebenzi & IFakalthi
StaffPage.subtitle: Hlangana nabasebenzi bezifundo kunye nabalawuli besebe le-Computer Science kwiYunivesithi yaseStellenbosch.

StudentsPage.title: Abafundi be-Postgraduate
StudentsPage.subtitle: Abafundi bophando beedoktoreyithi neemasters bangoku kwisebe le-Computer Science.

AlumniPage.title: I-Alumni
AlumniPage.subtitle: Ukubhiyozela abaphumeleleyo nabasebenzi bamandulo abaye bayila isebe lethu.
